ayahs.translation: Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Decree
And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree

ayahs.arabic: لَيۡلَةُ ٱلۡقَدۡرِ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡ أَلۡفِ شَهۡرٖ
ayahs.translation: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months
ayahs.transliteration: Laylatu alqadri khayrun min alfi shahrin

ayahs.arabic: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذۡنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمۡرٖ
ayahs.translation: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter
ayahs.transliteration: Tanazzalu almalaikatu waalrroohu feeha biithni rabbihim min kulli amrin

ayahs.translation: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn
